title: The Legend of Zelda: Link's Awakening
prompt:
Original illustration inspired by a retro Action-Adventure game.

A small child-sized adventurer seen from behind with a short sword at their side in a calm island shoreline facing a single steep mountain island with a smooth egg-shaped shrine at its summit across open water, standing still in sea wind as if washed ashore at the start of a dreamlike journey.

Visual focus:
- one clear subject
- strong silhouette
- readable in 1 second
- exactly one primary focal subject
- no crowd, no collage, no multi-character scene

Style:
- Game Boy aesthetic, green monochrome palette, crisp pixel forms, portable mood, and very clean value separation
- pixel art or stylized rendering depending on platform
- clean and modern interpretation of retro limitations
- limited color palette when relevant

Mood:
- lonely, dreamlike, adventurous

Composition:
- small child-sized foreground figure near the lower edge, broad water in the middle, one dominant distant mountain with an egg-shaped summit form, simple clouds, strong negative space
- simple background
- no clutter

Important:
- Do NOT replicate any official character, logo, or design
- Do NOT imitate exact game assets
- Must feel original but clearly inspired by the game's genre and atmosphere

Output:
- high clarity
- strong contrast
- minimal noise
- no text
- no watermark

Important - do NOT include: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid Link likeness, avoid exact island mountain shapes from official art, avoid official shield and hat details, avoid title-screen text or logos, avoid exact Wind Fish egg iconography, avoid resemblance to link, avoid resemblance to zelda. No copyrighted characters, no logos, no recognizable IP.
negative_prompt: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid Link likeness, avoid exact island mountain shapes from official art, avoid official shield and hat details, avoid title-screen text or logos, avoid exact Wind Fish egg iconography, avoid resemblance to link, avoid resemblance to zelda
revised_prompt: Create an original illustration inspired by the aesthetic of retro Action-Adventure games, devoid of any direct references or likenesses to copyrighted characters. Picture a small shock of a child-sized adventurer seen from behind, holding a short sword at their side. They are situated on a serene island shoreline with their gaze locked onto a distant, steep mountain island. At the mountain's summit lies a smooth, egg-shaped shrine. The adventurer stands still, the sea wind gently brushing them, as if they've just been washed ashore, marking the beginning of a dreamlike journey. Maintain a strong silhouette with one clear subject which is instantly readable, ensuring that no crowd or additional characters muddle the composition. Emulate the visual style of the Game Boy; a green monochrome palette with sharp, pixelated forms that convey a nostalgic, portable aura. The image should have clean value separation and an uncluttered background, with the primary focus being the lonely adventurer, the vast water body, and the mountain with its peculiar summit in the distance. The mood should be one of solitude, dreams, and adventure. Finally, ensure high clarity, sharp contrast, and minimal noise in the finished piece, with no text or watermarks present.
